top_signals.title: Xi sets out China’s goal to be global AI leader
top_signals.summary: President calls for ‘positive’ use of technology as Beijing seeks to strengthen influence over standards
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Inside the Chinese fraud rings stealing billions from banks and retailers
top_signals.summary: Chinese organized crime groups are making as much as $1 billion annually in tap-to-pay fraud schemes targeting retailers and banks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Questions and Answers on the 2026 Rule of Law Report
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Questions and answers Brussels, 17 Jul 2026 What is the Rule of Law Report?
The Rule of Law Report is the Commission's annual preventive and monitoring tool for taking stock of rule of law developments ac...

top_signals.title: 2026 Rule of Law Report strengthens Europe's prosperity, security and democratic resilience
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 17 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission published its seventh annual Rule of Law Report, assessing the state of the rule of law across all EU Member States, as well as four candidate countries: Albania, Montenegro, North Macedonia and Serbia.
